property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
D:\soft_1\jdk17 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Users	he_qing in;D:\soft_1\Git\mingw64 in;D:\soft_1\Git\usr\local in;D:\soft_1\Git\usr in;D:\soft_1\Git\usr in;D:\soft_1\Git\mingw64 in;D:\soft_1\Git\usr in;C:\Users	he_qing in;D:\VMware\VMware Workstation in;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH;D:\soft_1\matlab24Buntime\win64;D:\soft_1\matlab24B in;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0 in;D:\apache-maven-3.9.13 in;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;D:\soft_1
otepad\Notepad++;D:\soft_1\Git\cmd;D:\soft_1
ode;D:\soft_1\python_11\Scripts;D:\soft_1\python_11;C:\Users	he_qing\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314;C:\Users	he_qing\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Scripts;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in;C:\Users	he_qing\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;D:\soft_1\jdk17 in;D:\soft_1\IDEA\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.1 in;D:\soft_1\vscode\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users	he_qing\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Users	he_qing\AppData\Roaming
pm;D:\soft_1\Git\usr in\vendor_perl;D:\soft_1\Git\usr in\core_perl;.

testcase.name: testTeammateCannotClaimBlockedTask
testcase.system-out: 12:58:39.824 [main] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已创建: id=TASK-d8f6c51f-7c47-4b66-977f-093db739aa8d, subject=Blocker, blockedBy=[] 12:58:39.826 [main] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已创建: id=TASK-c3827b53-d322-476c-9ba7-faee4926c875, subject=Blocked, blockedBy=[TASK-d8f6c51f-7c47-4b66-977f-093db739aa8d] 12:58:39.830 [main] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已被认领: id=TASK-d8f6c51f-7c47-4b66-977f-093db739aa8d, agent=researcher 12:58:39.830 [main] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已完成: id=TASK-d8f6c51f-7c47-4b66-977f-093db739aa8d, agent=researcher 12:58:39.830 [main] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已被认领: id=TASK-c3827b53-d322-476c-9ba7-faee4926c875, agent=researcher

testcase.name: testLeadCreatesTasksAndTeammateClaimsAndCompletes
testcase.system-out: 12:58:39.875 [main] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已创建: id=TASK-72674916-cc49-4eed-93ef-262231cb60b0, subject=Research topic X, blockedBy=[] 12:58:39.875 [main] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已创建: id=TASK-87941e54-e895-4332-8b61-f65148396fee, subject=Implement feature Y, blockedBy=[TASK-72674916-cc49-4eed-93ef-262231cb60b0] 12:58:39.875 [main] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已被认领: id=TASK-72674916-cc49-4eed-93ef-262231cb60b0, agent=researcher 12:58:39.875 [main] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已完成: id=TASK-72674916-cc49-4eed-93ef-262231cb60b0, agent=researcher 12:58:39.907 [main] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已被认领: id=TASK-87941e54-e895-4332-8b61-f65148396fee, agent=researcher 12:58:39.908 [main] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已完成: id=TASK-87941e54-e895-4332-8b61-f65148396fee, agent=researcher

testcase.name: testTaskStoreCrossThreadAccess
testcase.system-out: 12:58:40.403 [main] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已创建: id=TASK-e5754b37-4c67-4855-87ec-7c6376304df7, subject=CrossThreadTask, blockedBy=[] 12:58:40.404 [Thread-4] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已被认领: id=TASK-e5754b37-4c67-4855-87ec-7c6376304df7, agent=worker-thread 12:58:40.404 [Thread-4] INFO com.kaer.service.impl.TaskServiceImpl -- [TaskService] 任务已完成: id=TASK-e5754b37-4c67-4855-87ec-7c6376304df7, agent=worker-thread
